title: Citharexylum amabile

The Verbenaceae family is a part of the order Lamiales, a large and diverse order of flowering plants that includes mint, jasmine, and honeysuckle. The family Verbenaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, with Citharexylum amabile likely being part of the subfamily Verbenoideae. The Verbenoideae subfamily includes over 150 genera of flowering plants, many of which are native to the Americas. The exact classification of Citharexylum amabile may require further research to determine its specific genus and species classification within the Verbenaceae family.
